query:
ALTER TABLE audit_logs 
ADD COLUMN performedBy INT NULL AFTER userId,
ADD INDEX audit_performed_by_idx (performedBy),
ADD INDEX audit_target_idx (targetType, targetId),
ADD INDEX audit_created_at_idx (createdAt);
